title: How to Set Up GHL Automations for Razorpay & UPI Payments — Indian Pricing Guide
description: Learn how to set up GHL automations for Razorpay & UPI payments in India. Step-by-step guide with ₹8,000-24,700/month pricing & WhatsApp automation for agenc...
html_content:
🚀 Try GoHighLevel FREE for 30 days — No credit card required. Start your free trial here →

Your Agency is Managing Too Many Tools. Here's How to Stop.

You're running an agency in Bangalore or Mumbai. You've got Zoho CRM for contacts, WhatsApp Business for messaging, Razorpay for payments, and Google Sheets for tracking automations. Your team of 4-5 people is drowning in manual work. Every payment that comes in requires a manual follow-up. Every lead needs to be entered into three different systems. Every invoice takes 30 minutes to create and send.

By the end of the day, you're not scaling. You're just working harder.

The Real Cost of Scattered Tools for Indian Agencies

This is the automation tax. Every tool you add creates friction. Your talent shortage gets worse because you need to hire people just to manage systems. A junior team member spends 2 hours a day doing what automation should do in 2 seconds. That's ₹15,000-25,000/month in wasted salary cost, just on data entry.

And when a payment comes through Razorpay or UPI, it disappears into your bank account with zero context. You don't know which client it's from. You don't know if it's a full payment or partial. You don't have an automated follow-up queued up.

Your competitors aren't dealing with this because they've consolidated. GoHighLevel (GHL) solves this by bringing Razorpay, UPI payments, WhatsApp automation, and CRM into one platform.

Why GoHighLevel Wins for Indian Agencies

GHL is built for exactly this problem. Unlike Zoho CRM (which is strong but requires separate payment connectors), GoHighLevel integrates Razorpay natively. That means:

  • Payment automations trigger instantly — When a Razorpay payment lands, your automation fires (send invoice, add to pipeline, trigger WhatsApp reminder)
  • WhatsApp is your primary channel — Not SMS. Not email. WhatsApp. Because that's how Indian clients communicate
  • One contract, one login — All your clients, payments, and automations live in one system
  • No GST compliance headaches — GHL handles subscription invoicing properly for Indian businesses
  • Scale without hiring — Automate payment confirmations, invoice reminders, and lead nurturing. Your 4-person team can now handle the work of 6-7

Real Example: How a Pune Digital Agency Automated ₹8L Monthly Invoicing

Let's say you're running a performance marketing agency in Pune. You have 12 active clients. Each client pays between ₹50,000-2,00,000/month via Razorpay or UPI. Right now:

  • Payment comes in → You manually log it in Zoho → Send an email invoice → Send a WhatsApp reminder if payment is late
  • This takes 15 minutes per payment. With 12 clients on different payment cycles, that's 3-4 hours/month just on payment admin

With GHL automation:

  • Payment hits Razorpay → Instantly logged in GHL CRM → Automated WhatsApp message sent: "Hi [Client Name], we've received your ₹[Amount] payment. Invoice #[ID] is attached"
  • If payment is 5 days late → Automated WhatsApp reminder: "Reminder: Your ₹[Amount] invoice is due"
  • If payment is 15 days late → Escalation trigger: Create internal task, notify account manager
  • Time saved: 3+ hours/month. Cost saved: ₹7,500-10,000/month in labor

GoHighLevel Pricing for Indian Agencies (₹ Rupees)

GHL offers several plans. Here's what makes sense for Indian agencies:

  • Starter Plan: $97/month (~₹8,000/month) — For freelancers, solo operators, or agencies just starting automation. Includes basic CRM, 10,000 contacts, WhatsApp integration, Razorpay connector
  • Agency Plan: $297/month (~₹24,700/month) — For growing agencies with 20-50 clients. Unlimited sub-accounts, advanced automations, priority support, client reporting dashboards
  • Enterprise: Custom pricing — For agencies managing 100+ clients or requiring white-label solutions

ROI Calculation: If you save even 10 hours/month on payment admin and client follow-ups, you're saving ₹15,000-20,000/month in labor cost. The Agency plan at ₹24,700/month pays for itself immediately, plus you get better client experience.

Step-by-Step: Setting Up Razorpay & UPI Automation in GHL

Step 1: Connect Your Razorpay Account

  • Log into GHL → Payments → Integrations
  • Select Razorpay (it's available directly in GHL's app marketplace)
  • Add your Razorpay API Key and Secret Key (found in your Razorpay dashboard under Settings → API Keys)
  • Authorize the connection. Done.

Step 2: Create a Payment Link Automation

  • Go to Workflows → Create New Automation
  • Trigger: "Payment Received via Razorpay"
  • Set the condition: If amount ≥ ₹50,000, run this workflow
  • Action 1: Add contact to "Paying Clients" pipeline
  • Action 2: Update custom field "Last Payment Date" with today's date
  • Action 3: Send WhatsApp message: "Thank you [Client Name]! We received your ₹[Amount] payment on [Date]. Your invoice is attached."

Step 3: WhatsApp Template Setup (India-Specific)

Important: WhatsApp has strict template approval in India. Your message template must be pre-approved by WhatsApp Business Platform.

  • Go to Settings → WhatsApp → Message Templates
  • Create template: "Hi {{ClientName}}, payment of ₹{{Amount}} received. Invoice {{InvoiceID}} attached. Thank you!"
  • Submit for approval (takes 24-48 hours)
  • Once approved, use this template in your Razorpay automation

Step 4: Late Payment Automation

  • Create new automation → Trigger: "Contact in Invoice pipeline + Invoice due date passed"
  • Delay: Wait 5 days after due date
  • Action: Send WhatsApp reminder: "Hi {{ClientName}}, your invoice for ₹{{Amount}} is now 5 days overdue. Please arrange payment at your earliest convenience."
  • Escalation: If payment not received after 10 days, create internal task assigned to account manager

Why This Beats Your Current Setup

vs. Zoho CRM + Razorpay: Zoho requires manual webhook configuration. GHL has native Razorpay integration with zero code.

vs. Zoho CRM + WhatsApp Business + Razorpay: You're paying for 3 subscriptions, 3 logins, 3 data entry processes. GHL is 1 system.

vs. Manual tracking: No spreadsheets. No missed follow-ups. No ₹10,000+ monthly labor cost on payment admin.

Frequently Asked Questions

Does GHL handle UPI payments directly?

UPI payments come through Razorpay. When a client pays you via UPI through a Razorpay link, GHL captures it the same way as credit card payments. The automation works identically.

Can I send WhatsApp automations to 500+ clients per month?

Yes. GHL's WhatsApp integration scales to your contact list. You're only limited by your WhatsApp Business API limits (which are generous for agencies). No per-message cost beyond your GHL subscription.

Is GHL better than Zoho CRM for Indian agencies?

Both are good. Zoho is cheaper (₹900-3,500/month) but requires 3-4 integrations to get what GHL does natively. GHL costs more but saves 10+ hours/month in setup and maintenance. For scaling agencies, GHL wins.

What about GST compliance?

GHL generates invoices with GST fields, but doesn't file GST returns. You'll still need to manually file GST-3B. Consider pairing with tools like Zoho Books (₹500/month) for full compliance if needed.

Can I white-label GHL for my clients?

Yes, with the Agency or Enterprise plan. You can white-label the entire platform under your agency brand.

The Bottom Line: Stop Managing Tools, Start Managing Growth

Every tool you remove from your stack is 2-3 hours/week you get back. Every automation you add is a client who feels more cared for. GoHighLevel brings Razorpay, UPI, WhatsApp, and CRM together so your Bangalore, Mumbai, Delhi, Hyderabad, or Pune-based agency can scale without scaling your headcount.

Your next step: Try GHL free for 30 days. Set up one Razorpay automation. Measure the time you save. Then decide if ₹8,000-24,700/month is worth 10+ hours of labor savings weekly. It almost always is.
